text: The College is easily accessible from Chennai Central Railway Station, Tambaram Railway Station, and CMDA Bus Station by the state operated transport service. In addition, the College provides its own transportation for students and staff residing in and around the campus.
The fleet consists of 22 buses, 1 Tata ACE, and 1 ambulance.
Service is available in Chennai, Chengalpattu, Kanchipuram, and Thiruvallur districts on all working days.
Daily commute for students and staff, local social service activities, sports activities, NCC/NSS activities, placement and training activities, industrial visits, educational trips.

A committee headed by a Convener manages smooth bus operations. Each bus has one teaching and one supporting staff in charge. The committee meets once every six months, and the Principal attends the meeting.
Dr. K. P. Santhosh Nathan is the Transport Convener, and Mr. A. Abdul Gafoor is the Assistant Transport Convener.
The MTC bus routes passing through MSAJCE include Route 19, Route 519, Route 221H, Route 102X, Route 102S, and Route 102. All routes operate daily.
All buses serve MSAJCE, MSAJAA, and Nursing students/staff, arriving at MSAJCE College at 8:00 AM.
The earliest departure is AR 7 at 5:25 AM from Chunambedu, and the latest departure is AR 10 at 6:25 AM from Porur.
Serves Uthiramerur with 16 total stops, first departure at 6:00 AM, college arrival at 8:00 AM. Driver: Mr. Sathish K.
Serves Moolakadai with 18 total stops, first departure at 6:10 AM, college arrival at 8:00 AM. Driver: Mr. M. Suresh.
